support_premium_description: The plugin works in the Shop-Script backend, supports Russian and English interfaces, and does not change the storefront design, cart, units of measurement, or order logic.
support_premium_description_ru_RU: Плагин работает в бекенде Shop-Script, поддерживает русский и английский интерфейс и не изменяет оформление витрины, корзину, единицы измерения и логику заказов.
support_premium_description_en_US: The plugin works in the Shop-Script backend, supports Russian and English interfaces, and does not change the storefront design, cart, units of measurement, or order logic.
